title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 417.436 - Invention developer law not exclusive subject to applicable laws
text:
417.436.  Invention developer law not exclusive subject to applicable laws. — The provisions of sections 417.400 to 417.436 are not exclusive and do not relieve the parties or the contract subject thereto from compliance with all other applicable provisions of law.
(L. 1995 S.B. 80 & 88)
